name: Gorjana
why: California-cool everyday jewelry brand competing on the aspirational layering/stacking aesthetic. Female athlete ambassador program and rare-sale urgency strategy set it apart. Competes on lifestyle positioning and accessible everyday gold jewelry.

ad_types.type: Athlete Ambassador Brand Film (TV + Paid Social)
ad_types.description: 30-second polished video spots featuring professional female athletes (Jessica Pegula, Cameron Brink) wearing Gorjana across lifestyle settings. Intercuts extreme close-ups of jewelry with full-body lifestyle shots. Upbeat empowering music, no voiceover. Runs on ESPN, Meta, and Instagram Reels.
ad_types.why_it_works: Athletes function as aspirational proxies for active confident women 25-40. 360-degree distribution creates omnipresence. Campaign drove 45% sales lift in direct mail. Athletes who 'live in' the jewelry create credibility beyond celebrity-for-hire.

ad_types.type: TikTok/Instagram UGC Influencer Haul + Discount Code Reel
ad_types.description: Creator-led 15-60 second videos of unboxing PR packages, trying on pieces, showing stacking combinations. Conversational tone, personal discount code revealed at end (e.g., PHOEBE20, LYDIA20). Filmed in natural settings with minimal editing.
ad_types.why_it_works: Personal discount code creates direct attribution loop while making viewer feel they get an exclusive deal. Haul format exploits unboxing dopamine pattern. UGC outperforms polished studio ads by 22% CTR in jewelry vertical.

ad_types.description: Paid static or multi-panel carousel during Black Friday, Cyber Monday, Mother's Day. Single hero product or curated gift set on clean white or warm background. Carousels show 4-8 products with price callouts. Urgency language and gift-positioning.
ad_types.why_it_works: During high-intent windows buyers are already shopping. Clean product-focused creative with clear pricing reduces friction. Gift-positioning maps product to emotional purchase occasion.

ad_types.description: 15-30 second Instagram Reels showing pieces styled across different aesthetics — coastal California, athleisure, evening glam, casual boho. 'Which one fits you?' interactive question. Golden-hour California outdoor lighting with quick cuts synced to music.
ad_types.why_it_works: 'Which aesthetic are you?' format exploits identity-based engagement. Drives high comments and saves boosting algorithmic reach. Shows how to style multiple pieces together increasing AOV.

ad_types.type: Beach/Outdoor Brand Lifestyle TV Spot (repurposed for social)
ad_types.description: 30-60 second brand video showing women wearing Gorjana at beach and casual settings. Tagline: 'California cool jewelry you'll live in, love always and layer every day.' Soft aspirational indie music. Cut into 6-15 second paid social versions.
ad_types.why_it_works: Establishes emotional brand equity before conversion ask. California coastal aesthetic is highly aspirational for target demo. Repurposing TV creative reduces production cost while maintaining quality.

visual_style: Consistently warm, California coastal, and aspirational-but-accessible. Dominant aesthetic is golden-hour lifestyle photography — sun-drenched skin, layered gold jewelry, outdoor/beach settings. Production ranges from high-end brand film to lo-fi iPhone UGC, but both maintain warmth and approachability. Avoids cold, dark, or overtly luxury aesthetics. White backgrounds for product-only sale ads. Typography is minimal — thin sans-serif or simple serif. No heavy text overlays in brand content.
hooks: Identity/Aesthetic Matching — 'gorjana has a piece for every aesthetic — which one fits you?'
Athlete/Lifestyle Aspiration — no-voiceover visual hook with Jessica Pegula on court, cuts to jewelry close-up
Urgency + Scarcity in Sale Ads — 'Gorjana is having a great sale — they NEVER have sales!'
UGC Reveal / Unboxing Hook — 'I just received the MOST gorgeous PR package from Gorjana...'
viral_patterns: Yellow Friday color takeover (Kendra Scott — observed for comparison)

content_cadence.frequency: 3-5x/week Instagram posts, regular Reels, Stories during sale events
content_cadence.seasonal_peaks: Black Friday/Cyber Monday, Mother's Day, holiday Q4

ugc_creator_strategy.approach: 23+ active influencer discount codes at any given time. Codes distributed entirely through creators (not brand channels). Creator-mediated distribution model.
ugc_creator_strategy.content_types: Unboxing hauls, try-on Reels, stacking demos

creative_testing_patterns.method: Athlete ambassador content vs standard influencer content. TV spot repurposed into multiple social cut lengths (6s, 15s, 30s).
creative_testing_patterns.documented_results: 45% sales lift from Sports Club ambassador campaign direct mail tie-in

spend_signals.channels: ESPN CTV, Meta, Instagram, TikTok, direct mail catalogs
spend_signals.investment_areas: Athlete ambassador program (TV + social), influencer discount code ecosystem, holiday promotional windows
spend_signals.notable: Rare-sale strategy means concentrated spend during limited promotional windows. 23+ simultaneous influencer codes suggest significant affiliate/creator budget.
